summary: EXP-172 adds new Section 2b.5 "The 100% Dashboard: One Ruler, Twenty-Eight Rooms" — systematic audit of all 28 scored domains in the dome live dashboard. Maps each domain to its driving parameters via formula_runtime.json (6 formulas, ~10 knobs). Classification: 14 STATIC (static-win re-references), 5 BORROWED (sidereal day / solar day / WGS84 gravity / H0 / Schumann classical), 2 TAUTOLOGY (Tesla frequency + kappa), 2 THEORY-FRAMEWORK (Selleri/Lorentz recasts), 3 LOOSE (50% tolerances, >2sigma, directional), and ~2 genuinely-discriminating cells (NMP Longitude, Aetheric Redshift). Frames with dome author own quote: "Display ratio is bookkeeping, not a substitute for claim-by-claim audit." Also flags that WIN-024, WIN-001, WIN-039 each appear twice in the 28. Kernel-of-truth paragraph credits the April 2026 rigor upgrades. Counterpoints preserved.
newsworthy: Dome author's own methodology.json calls for a claim-by-claim audit the "100.0% / 28 of 28" dashboard bypasses — when we perform it using the dome's own formula_runtime.json, the 28 passes collapse to ~2 discriminating cells plus 14 static re-reads, 5 globe imports, and 2 Tesla tautologies.
